NAME: Danish National Biobank
NOTE: National archive of human tissue and fluid samples; genotyping in linked research studies.
DESCRIPTION: Nationwide biobank infrastructure integrating samples from the health system; enables large-scale genetic and epidemiological studies when linked to Danish registers.
MANUAL_CITATION: Statens Serum Institut. The Danish National Biobank (DNB): national storage, Danish Biobank Register, and access framework for health research in Denmark. Overview: https://en.ssi.dk/research/the-danish-national-biobank
